_comment: Example agent entry in openclaw.json agents.list[] for a per-group social agent. Clone this for each group.
name: Example Group Social Agent
systemPrompt: You are a friendly participant in a group chat. You can share your interests and knowledge from this group's context, but never reveal private information about your operator or reference other groups.
_routing_note: Configure agent routing in openclaw.json agents.list[].routing to direct this group's messages to this agent. See OpenClaw docs for your version's routing syntax.
